dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4182 IS: Fostering the Availability in Rural Markets of Home Loans Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Welch (for himself, Mr. Justice, Mr. Schiff, and Mrs. Hyde-Smith) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Farm Credit Act of 1971 to modify rural housing financing under that Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Fostering the Availability in Rural Markets of Home Loans Act of 2026 or the FARM Home Loans Act of 2026.
Section 1.11(b) of the Farm Credit Act of 1971 (12 U.S.C. 2019(b)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2), by striking appurtenances and inserting appurtenances, including accessory dwelling units,; and
in paragraph (3), by striking 2,500 and inserting 10,000.
